creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Updating port textproc/xerces-c3 (3.2.3 -> 3.2.4) fails on all CURRENT boxes (recent CURRENT, havent't checked other OS versions, but the failure seems independent) while installing. After this last step failure, the port is gone (traditinal make build):

[...]
===>  Installing for xerces-c3-3.2.4
===>   Registering installation for xerces-c3-3.2.4 as automatic
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/textproc/xerces-c3/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libxerces-c.so.3.2:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/textproc/xerces-c3
